revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1223378013|1223378013]] by [[Special:Contributions/Mathglot|Mathglot]] ([[User talk:Mathglot|talk]]) Never mind; it was already there—but under the full name which is pretty unwieldy; would probably be better to replace that with this entry but whatever.
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: moved [[Template:Navbox other uses templates]] to [[Template:Navbox hatnote templates]]: corresponding with content, WP:Hatnote, and documentation
Updated page name ([[Wikipedia:Hatnote test]]) and removed [[Template:Rellink]] (due to merging into [[Template:Hatnote]])
Removed [[Template:Other uses-section]] - functionality has now been completely absorbed into [[Template:About]], and all transclusions have been replaced
Removed [[Wikipedia:Hatnote test]] - now a redirect to [[Template:Hatnote templates documentation]]
Sardanaphalus moved page [[Template:Navbox hatnote templates]] to [[Template:Hatnote templates]]: "Navbox" not needed (unlike "Infobox")..?
Integrated "See also" section from Template:Hatnote templates documentation
Undid revision 676474754 by [[Special:Contributions/Steel1943|Steel1943]] ([[User talk:Steel1943|talk]]) reverting now that [[Template:Hatnote templates documentation]] contains a section redirect
Undid revision 676475628 by [[Special:Contributions/Steel1943|Steel1943]] ([[User talk:Steel1943|talk]]) revert my revert
trying to lose extra white space when template transcludes to articles
link back to where [[Template:Hatnote templates documentation]] was moved to on August 10, 2015. I don't really understand the rationale for that.
I suppose this is a more elegant way to link to the documentation
99% sure that the template should be {{cat main}} there since the parenthetical example is cat main (but I may be wrong)
Removed {{other places3}}, then merged "other places" row into "other topics" row as {{other places}} was only remaining entry in the "other places" row
Replacing {{redirect4}} and {{redirect5}} with {{redirect-multi}} per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 June 23#Redirect4, redirect5, redirect7, and redirect11, to redirect-multi|merge]]
Removed example parameters (and duplication for the sake of example parameters), added some parenthetical notes on use; {{tl}} instead of {{tlx}}
Merged "other uses of" section into "other uses" section
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Hatnote templates | state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | title = [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]]
| above = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Redirect]]
| group1 = Main articles | list1 = *{{tl|main article}} *{{tl|cat main}} (for categories)
| group2 = Generic | list2 = * {{tl|hatnote}} * {{tl|selfref}} (for [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-references]])
| group3 = Other uses | list3 = * {{tl|about}} * {{tl|about2}} (for custom text) * Variations: {{tl|other uses}} * {{tl|other uses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix) * {{tl|other uses of}} (provides context for disambiguation) * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses}} * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix)
| group4 = For (other topic) | list4 = * {{tl|for}} * {{tl|for2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|about}}
| group5 = Further information | list5 = * {{tl|further}} * {{tl|further2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|details}} * {{tl|outline}}
| group6 = See also | list6 = * {{tl|see also}}
| group7 = Other people | list7 = * {{tl|other people}} * {{tl|about-otherpeople|USE|NAME|PAGE1}} (adds "about" description) * {{tl|other people5}} (for "similar" names)
| group8 = Other topics | list8 = * {{tl|other hurricanes}} * {{tl|other places}} * {{tl|other ships}}
| group9 = Redirect | list9 = * {{tl|redirect}} * {{tl|redirect2}} (for two redirects) * {{tl|redirect-multi}} (for multiple redirects) * {{tl|redirect-several}} (for several redirects, without listing each) * {{tl|redirect3}} (for custom text)
| group10 = "Not to be confused with..." | list10 = * {{tl|distinguish}} * {{tl|distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish}} * {{tl|redirect-distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish6}} * {{tl|About-distinguish}} * {{tl|About-distinguish2}} (for custom text)
| group11 = Hatnote categories | list11 = * [[:Category:Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]] * [[:Category:Hatnote modules|Hatnote modules]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|for category pages]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for names|for [family] names]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for lists|for lists]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for user pages|for user pages]]
| below = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates documentation]] * {{icon|cat}} [[:Category:Hatnote templates]] }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: add * {{tl|category see also}} + {{tl|category see also if exists}}
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Hatnote templates | state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | title = [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]]
| above = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Redirect]]
| group1 = Main articles | list1 = *{{tl|main article}} *{{tl|cat main}} (for categories)
| group2 = Generic | list2 = * {{tl|hatnote}} * {{tl|selfref}} (for [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-references]])
| group3 = Other uses | list3 = * {{tl|about}} * {{tl|about2}} (for custom text) * Variations: {{tl|other uses}} * {{tl|other uses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix) * {{tl|other uses of}} (provides context for disambiguation) * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses}} * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix)
| group4 = For (other topic) | list4 = * {{tl|for}} * {{tl|for2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|about}}
| group5 = Further information | list5 = * {{tl|further}} * {{tl|further2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|details}} * {{tl|outline}}
| group6 = See also | list6 = * {{tl|see also}} * {{tl|category see also}} * {{tl|category see also if exists}}
| group7 = Other people | list7 = * {{tl|other people}} * {{tl|about-otherpeople|USE|NAME|PAGE1}} (adds "about" description) * {{tl|other people5}} (for "similar" names)
| group8 = Other topics | list8 = * {{tl|other hurricanes}} * {{tl|other places}} * {{tl|other ships}}
| group9 = Redirect | list9 = * {{tl|redirect}} * {{tl|redirect2}} (for two redirects) * {{tl|redirect-multi}} (for multiple redirects) * {{tl|redirect-several}} (for several redirects, without listing each) * {{tl|redirect3}} (for custom text)
| group10 = "Not to be confused with..." | list10 = * {{tl|distinguish}} * {{tl|distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish}} * {{tl|redirect-distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish6}} * {{tl|About-distinguish}} * {{tl|About-distinguish2}} (for custom text)
| group11 = Hatnote categories | list11 = * [[:Category:Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]] * [[:Category:Hatnote modules|Hatnote modules]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|for category pages]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for names|for [family] names]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for lists|for lists]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for user pages|for user pages]]
| below = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates documentation]] * {{icon|cat}} [[:Category:Hatnote templates]] }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: one template was renamed. other templates case to match normal use and examples.
Undid revision 892845906 by [[Special:Contributions/Metalwolf877|Metalwolf877]] ([[User talk:Metalwolf877|talk]]) Unexplained blanking
"other people" is a subtopic of "other topics"

[[Template:This user talk]] (the single template available through this link) goes against some basic hatnote logic ([[WP:NAMB]], etc); if people would like to place it on their talk pages that's fine, but it shouldn't get advertised here
move categories as daughter nodes of the big category link at the bottom
actually, this duplicates the link at the very top
move category hatnotes into the dedicated [[Template:Category hatnote templates]]

rm {{Other Pennsylvania townships}} and {{Pope Stephen ToP Dab}} – chances are that all articles that ever needed hatnotes for Pennsylvanian townships or for popes named "Stephen" will already have them by now – unlikely to be sought by editors using this navbox
move templates for use in article sections (rather than in lede) into a separate group; reorganise the rest
*{{tl|For outline}} is used only in sections
/* top */ the template's name here was actually a better guide to its use than the explanatory note

Undid revision 958664017 by [[Special:Contributions/Zyxw|Zyxw]] ([[User talk:Zyxw|talk]]) this is only for mainspace templates (category template are listed in [[Template:Category hatnote templates]], the newly created template-specific version of "see also" is too obscure to be listed here anyway)
Removed Other_uses2 as it's being deleted
Group 6 (For use in sections): Add [[Template:Further ill]].
Updated template names after moving them to those names
rm {{Redirect-distinguish-for}}: it's an extremely obscure template that also should probably be deprecated and deleted as it uses a non-standard order of entries
/* top */ this section is only for the most basic templates: if it's got "distinguish" in it, it should be listed in the "Distinguish" section further down
remove {{about-redirect}} from this navbox – that template is being deleted at TfD

Group 6 (For use in sections) : Add {{Further ill}}. Note: use full pagename to ensure bold black text while viewing that template page, but follow presentation style with curlies etc., of all the other links for consistency.
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 18:43:04 on [[Template:Hatnote templates]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/203.88.11.2|203.88.11.2]] ([[User talk:203.88.11.2|talk]]) unexplained removal of content ([[WP:HG|HG]])
Updated page name ([[Wikipedia:Hatnote test]]) and removed [[Template:Rellink]] (due to merging into [[Template:Hatnote]])
Removed [[Template:Other uses-section]] - functionality has now been completely absorbed into [[Template:About]], and all transclusions have been replaced
Removed [[Wikipedia:Hatnote test]] - now a redirect to [[Template:Hatnote templates documentation]]
Integrated "See also" section from Template:Hatnote templates documentation
Undid revision 676474754 by [[Special:Contributions/Steel1943|Steel1943]] ([[User talk:Steel1943|talk]]) reverting now that [[Template:Hatnote templates documentation]] contains a section redirect
Undid revision 676475628 by [[Special:Contributions/Steel1943|Steel1943]] ([[User talk:Steel1943|talk]]) revert my revert
trying to lose extra white space when template transcludes to articles
Undid revision 688222541 by [[Special:Contributions/Sarrena|Sarrena]] ([[User talk:Sarrena|talk]]) that's not how the template works - see [[Template:About/doc]]
link back to where [[Template:Hatnote templates documentation]] was moved to on August 10, 2015. I don't really understand the rationale for that.
I suppose this is a more elegant way to link to the documentation
99% sure that the template should be {{cat main}} there since the parenthetical example is cat main (but I may be wrong)
Removed {{other places3}}, then merged "other places" row into "other topics" row as {{other places}} was only remaining entry in the "other places" row
Replacing {{redirect4}} and {{redirect5}} with {{redirect-multi}} per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 June 23#Redirect4, redirect5, redirect7, and redirect11, to redirect-multi|merge]]
Removed example parameters (and duplication for the sake of example parameters), added some parenthetical notes on use; {{tl}} instead of {{tlx}}
Merged "other uses of" section into "other uses" section
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Hatnote templates | state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | title = [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]]
| above = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Redirect]]
| group1 = Main articles | list1 = *{{tl|main article}} *{{tl|cat main}} (for categories)
| group2 = Generic | list2 = * {{tl|hatnote}} * {{tl|selfref}} (for [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-references]])
| group3 = Other uses | list3 = * {{tl|about}} * {{tl|about2}} (for custom text) * Variations: {{tl|other uses}} * {{tl|other uses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix) * {{tl|other uses of}} (provides context for disambiguation) * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses}} * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix)
| group4 = For (other topic) | list4 = * {{tl|for}} * {{tl|for2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|about}}
| group5 = Further information | list5 = * {{tl|further}} * {{tl|further2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|details}} * {{tl|outline}}
| group6 = See also | list6 = * {{tl|see also}}
| group7 = Other people | list7 = * {{tl|other people}} * {{tl|about-otherpeople|USE|NAME|PAGE1}} (adds "about" description) * {{tl|other people5}} (for "similar" names)
| group8 = Other topics | list8 = * {{tl|other hurricanes}} * {{tl|other places}} * {{tl|other ships}}
| group9 = Redirect | list9 = * {{tl|redirect}} * {{tl|redirect2}} (for two redirects) * {{tl|redirect-multi}} (for multiple redirects) * {{tl|redirect-several}} (for several redirects, without listing each) * {{tl|redirect3}} (for custom text)
| group10 = "Not to be confused with..." | list10 = * {{tl|distinguish}} * {{tl|distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish}} * {{tl|redirect-distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish6}} * {{tl|About-distinguish}} * {{tl|About-distinguish2}} (for custom text)
| group11 = Hatnote categories | list11 = * [[:Category:Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]] * [[:Category:Hatnote modules|Hatnote modules]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|for category pages]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for names|for [family] names]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for lists|for lists]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for user pages|for user pages]]
| below = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates documentation]] * {{icon|cat}} [[:Category:Hatnote templates]] }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: add * {{tl|category see also}} + {{tl|category see also if exists}}
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Hatnote templates | state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | title = [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]]
| above = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Redirect]]
| group1 = Main articles | list1 = *{{tl|main article}} *{{tl|cat main}} (for categories)
| group2 = Generic | list2 = * {{tl|hatnote}} * {{tl|selfref}} (for [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-references]])

| group8 = Other topics | list8 = * {{tl|other hurricanes}} * {{tl|other places}} * {{tl|other ships}}

| group10 = "Not to be confused with..." | list10 = * {{tl|distinguish}} * {{tl|distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish}} * {{tl|redirect-distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish6}} * {{tl|About-distinguish}} * {{tl|About-distinguish2}} (for custom text)
| group11 = Hatnote categories | list11 = * [[:Category:Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]] * [[:Category:Hatnote modules|Hatnote modules]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|for category pages]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for names|for [family] names]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for lists|for lists]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for user pages|for user pages]]

revision.comment: one template was renamed. other templates case to match normal use and examples.
Undid revision 892845906 by [[Special:Contributions/Metalwolf877|Metalwolf877]] ([[User talk:Metalwolf877|talk]]) Unexplained blanking
"other people" is a subtopic of "other topics"

[[Template:This user talk]] (the single template available through this link) goes against some basic hatnote logic ([[WP:NAMB]], etc); if people would like to place it on their talk pages that's fine, but it shouldn't get advertised here
move categories as daughter nodes of the big category link at the bottom
actually, this duplicates the link at the very top
move category hatnotes into the dedicated [[Template:Category hatnote templates]]

rm {{Other Pennsylvania townships}} and {{Pope Stephen ToP Dab}} – chances are that all articles that ever needed hatnotes for Pennsylvanian townships or for popes named "Stephen" will already have them by now – unlikely to be sought by editors using this navbox
move templates for use in article sections (rather than in lede) into a separate group; reorganise the rest
*{{tl|For outline}} is used only in sections
/* top */ the template's name here was actually a better guide to its use than the explanatory note
Removed Other_uses2 as it's being deleted
Group 6 (For use in sections): Add [[Template:Further ill]].
Updated template names after moving them to those names
rm {{Redirect-distinguish-for}}: it's an extremely obscure template that also should probably be deprecated and deleted as it uses a non-standard order of entries
/* top */ this section is only for the most basic templates: if it's got "distinguish" in it, it should be listed in the "Distinguish" section further down
remove {{about-redirect}} from this navbox – that template is being deleted at TfD

Group 6 (For use in sections) : Add {{Further ill}}. Note: use full pagename to ensure bold black text while viewing that template page, but follow presentation style with curlies etc., of all the other links for consistency.
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 18:53:04 on [[Template:Hatnote templates]]

revision.comment: moved [[Template:Navbox other uses templates]] to [[Template:Navbox hatnote templates]]: corresponding with content, WP:Hatnote, and documentation
Updated page name ([[Wikipedia:Hatnote test]]) and removed [[Template:Rellink]] (due to merging into [[Template:Hatnote]])
Removed [[Template:Other uses-section]] - functionality has now been completely absorbed into [[Template:About]], and all transclusions have been replaced
Removed [[Wikipedia:Hatnote test]] - now a redirect to [[Template:Hatnote templates documentation]]
Sardanaphalus moved page [[Template:Navbox hatnote templates]] to [[Template:Hatnote templates]]: "Navbox" not needed (unlike "Infobox")..?
Integrated "See also" section from Template:Hatnote templates documentation
trying to lose extra white space when template transcludes to articles
link back to where [[Template:Hatnote templates documentation]] was moved to on August 10, 2015. I don't really understand the rationale for that.
I suppose this is a more elegant way to link to the documentation
99% sure that the template should be {{cat main}} there since the parenthetical example is cat main (but I may be wrong)
Removed {{other places3}}, then merged "other places" row into "other topics" row as {{other places}} was only remaining entry in the "other places" row
Replacing {{redirect4}} and {{redirect5}} with {{redirect-multi}} per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 June 23#Redirect4, redirect5, redirect7, and redirect11, to redirect-multi|merge]]
Removed example parameters (and duplication for the sake of example parameters), added some parenthetical notes on use; {{tl}} instead of {{tlx}}
Merged "other uses of" section into "other uses" section
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Hatnote templates | state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | title = [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]]
| above = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Redirect]]
| group1 = Main articles | list1 = *{{tl|main article}} *{{tl|cat main}} (for categories)
| group2 = Generic | list2 = * {{tl|hatnote}} * {{tl|selfref}} (for [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-references]])
| group3 = Other uses | list3 = * {{tl|about}} * {{tl|about2}} (for custom text) * Variations: {{tl|other uses}} * {{tl|other uses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix) * {{tl|other uses of}} (provides context for disambiguation) * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses}} * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix)
| group4 = For (other topic) | list4 = * {{tl|for}} * {{tl|for2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|about}}
| group5 = Further information | list5 = * {{tl|further}} * {{tl|further2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|details}} * {{tl|outline}}
| group6 = See also | list6 = * {{tl|see also}}
| group7 = Other people | list7 = * {{tl|other people}} * {{tl|about-otherpeople|USE|NAME|PAGE1}} (adds "about" description) * {{tl|other people5}} (for "similar" names)
| group8 = Other topics | list8 = * {{tl|other hurricanes}} * {{tl|other places}} * {{tl|other ships}}
| group9 = Redirect | list9 = * {{tl|redirect}} * {{tl|redirect2}} (for two redirects) * {{tl|redirect-multi}} (for multiple redirects) * {{tl|redirect-several}} (for several redirects, without listing each) * {{tl|redirect3}} (for custom text)
| group10 = "Not to be confused with..." | list10 = * {{tl|distinguish}} * {{tl|distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish}} * {{tl|redirect-distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish6}} * {{tl|About-distinguish}} * {{tl|About-distinguish2}} (for custom text)
| group11 = Hatnote categories | list11 = * [[:Category:Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]] * [[:Category:Hatnote modules|Hatnote modules]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|for category pages]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for names|for [family] names]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for lists|for lists]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for user pages|for user pages]]
| below = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates documentation]] * {{icon|cat}} [[:Category:Hatnote templates]] }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Hatnote templates | state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | title = [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]]
| above = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Redirect]]
| group1 = Main articles | list1 = *{{tl|main article}} *{{tl|cat main}} (for categories)
| group2 = Generic | list2 = * {{tl|hatnote}} * {{tl|selfref}} (for [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-references]])
| group3 = Other uses | list3 = * {{tl|about}} * {{tl|about2}} (for custom text) * Variations: {{tl|other uses}} * {{tl|other uses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix) * {{tl|other uses of}} (provides context for disambiguation) * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses}} * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix)
| group4 = For (other topic) | list4 = * {{tl|for}} * {{tl|for2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|about}}
| group5 = Further information | list5 = * {{tl|further}} * {{tl|further2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|details}} * {{tl|outline}}
| group6 = See also | list6 = * {{tl|see also}}
| group7 = Other people | list7 = * {{tl|other people}} * {{tl|about-otherpeople|USE|NAME|PAGE1}} (adds "about" description) * {{tl|other people5}} (for "similar" names)
| group8 = Other topics | list8 = * {{tl|other hurricanes}} * {{tl|other places}} * {{tl|other ships}}
| group9 = Redirect | list9 = * {{tl|redirect}} * {{tl|redirect2}} (for two redirects) * {{tl|redirect-multi}} (for multiple redirects) * {{tl|redirect-several}} (for several redirects, without listing each) * {{tl|redirect3}} (for custom text)
| group10 = "Not to be confused with..." | list10 = * {{tl|distinguish}} * {{tl|distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish}} * {{tl|redirect-distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish6}} * {{tl|About-distinguish}} * {{tl|About-distinguish2}} (for custom text)
| group11 = Hatnote categories | list11 = * [[:Category:Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]] * [[:Category:Hatnote modules|Hatnote modules]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|for category pages]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for names|for [family] names]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for lists|for lists]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for user pages|for user pages]]
| below = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates documentation]] * {{icon|cat}} [[:Category:Hatnote templates]] }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Hatnote templates | state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | title = [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]]
| above = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Redirect]]
| group1 = Main articles | list1 = *{{tl|main article}} *{{tl|cat main}} (for categories)
| group2 = Generic | list2 = * {{tl|hatnote}} * {{tl|selfref}} (for [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-references]])
| group3 = Other uses | list3 = * {{tl|about}} * {{tl|about2}} (for custom text) * Variations: {{tl|other uses}} * {{tl|other uses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix) * {{tl|other uses of}} (provides context for disambiguation) * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses}} * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix)
| group4 = For (other topic) | list4 = * {{tl|for}} * {{tl|for2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|about}}
| group5 = Further information | list5 = * {{tl|further}} * {{tl|further2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|details}} * {{tl|outline}}
| group6 = See also | list6 = * {{tl|see also}} * {{tl|category see also}} * {{tl|category see also if exists}}
| group7 = Other people | list7 = * {{tl|other people}} * {{tl|about-otherpeople|USE|NAME|PAGE1}} (adds "about" description) * {{tl|other people5}} (for "similar" names)
| group8 = Other topics | list8 = * {{tl|other hurricanes}} * {{tl|other places}} * {{tl|other ships}}
| group9 = Redirect | list9 = * {{tl|redirect}} * {{tl|redirect2}} (for two redirects) * {{tl|redirect-multi}} (for multiple redirects) * {{tl|redirect-several}} (for several redirects, without listing each) * {{tl|redirect3}} (for custom text)
| group10 = "Not to be confused with..." | list10 = * {{tl|distinguish}} * {{tl|distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish}} * {{tl|redirect-distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish6}} * {{tl|About-distinguish}} * {{tl|About-distinguish2}} (for custom text)
| group11 = Hatnote categories | list11 = * [[:Category:Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]] * [[:Category:Hatnote modules|Hatnote modules]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|for category pages]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for names|for [family] names]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for lists|for lists]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for user pages|for user pages]]
| below = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates documentation]] * {{icon|cat}} [[:Category:Hatnote templates]] }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: one template was renamed. other templates case to match normal use and examples.
Undid revision 892845906 by [[Special:Contributions/Metalwolf877|Metalwolf877]] ([[User talk:Metalwolf877|talk]]) Unexplained blanking
"other people" is a subtopic of "other topics"

[[Template:This user talk]] (the single template available through this link) goes against some basic hatnote logic ([[WP:NAMB]], etc); if people would like to place it on their talk pages that's fine, but it shouldn't get advertised here
move categories as daughter nodes of the big category link at the bottom
actually, this duplicates the link at the very top
move category hatnotes into the dedicated [[Template:Category hatnote templates]]

rm {{Other Pennsylvania townships}} and {{Pope Stephen ToP Dab}} – chances are that all articles that ever needed hatnotes for Pennsylvanian townships or for popes named "Stephen" will already have them by now – unlikely to be sought by editors using this navbox
move templates for use in article sections (rather than in lede) into a separate group; reorganise the rest
*{{tl|For outline}} is used only in sections
/* top */ the template's name here was actually a better guide to its use than the explanatory note

Undid revision 958664017 by [[Special:Contributions/Zyxw|Zyxw]] ([[User talk:Zyxw|talk]]) this is only for mainspace templates (category template are listed in [[Template:Category hatnote templates]], the newly created template-specific version of "see also" is too obscure to be listed here anyway)
Removed Other_uses2 as it's being deleted
Group 6 (For use in sections): Add [[Template:Further ill]].
Updated template names after moving them to those names
rm {{Redirect-distinguish-for}}: it's an extremely obscure template that also should probably be deprecated and deleted as it uses a non-standard order of entries
/* top */ this section is only for the most basic templates: if it's got "distinguish" in it, it should be listed in the "Distinguish" section further down
remove {{about-redirect}} from this navbox – that template is being deleted at TfD

Group 6 (For use in sections) : Add {{Further ill}}. Note: use full pagename to ensure bold black text while viewing that template page, but follow presentation style with curlies etc., of all the other links for consistency.
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 18:54:08 on [[Template:Hatnote templates]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/203.88.11.2|203.88.11.2]] ([[User talk:203.88.11.2|talk]]) unexplained removal of content ([[WP:HG|HG]])
Updated page name ([[Wikipedia:Hatnote test]]) and removed [[Template:Rellink]] (due to merging into [[Template:Hatnote]])
Removed [[Template:Other uses-section]] - functionality has now been completely absorbed into [[Template:About]], and all transclusions have been replaced
Removed [[Wikipedia:Hatnote test]] - now a redirect to [[Template:Hatnote templates documentation]]
Sardanaphalus moved page [[Template:Navbox hatnote templates]] to [[Template:Hatnote templates]]: "Navbox" not needed (unlike "Infobox")..?
Integrated "See also" section from Template:Hatnote templates documentation
trying to lose extra white space when template transcludes to articles
link back to where [[Template:Hatnote templates documentation]] was moved to on August 10, 2015. I don't really understand the rationale for that.
I suppose this is a more elegant way to link to the documentation
99% sure that the template should be {{cat main}} there since the parenthetical example is cat main (but I may be wrong)
Removed {{other places3}}, then merged "other places" row into "other topics" row as {{other places}} was only remaining entry in the "other places" row
Replacing {{redirect4}} and {{redirect5}} with {{redirect-multi}} per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 June 23#Redirect4, redirect5, redirect7, and redirect11, to redirect-multi|merge]]
Removed example parameters (and duplication for the sake of example parameters), added some parenthetical notes on use; {{tl}} instead of {{tlx}}
Merged "other uses of" section into "other uses" section
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Hatnote templates | state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | title = [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]]
| above = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Redirect]]
| group1 = Main articles | list1 = *{{tl|main article}} *{{tl|cat main}} (for categories)
| group2 = Generic | list2 = * {{tl|hatnote}} * {{tl|selfref}} (for [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-references]])
| group3 = Other uses | list3 = * {{tl|about}} * {{tl|about2}} (for custom text) * Variations: {{tl|other uses}} * {{tl|other uses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix) * {{tl|other uses of}} (provides context for disambiguation) * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses}} * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix)
| group4 = For (other topic) | list4 = * {{tl|for}} * {{tl|for2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|about}}
| group5 = Further information | list5 = * {{tl|further}} * {{tl|further2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|details}} * {{tl|outline}}
| group6 = See also | list6 = * {{tl|see also}}
| group7 = Other people | list7 = * {{tl|other people}} * {{tl|about-otherpeople|USE|NAME|PAGE1}} (adds "about" description) * {{tl|other people5}} (for "similar" names)
| group8 = Other topics | list8 = * {{tl|other hurricanes}} * {{tl|other places}} * {{tl|other ships}}
| group9 = Redirect | list9 = * {{tl|redirect}} * {{tl|redirect2}} (for two redirects) * {{tl|redirect-multi}} (for multiple redirects) * {{tl|redirect-several}} (for several redirects, without listing each) * {{tl|redirect3}} (for custom text)
| group10 = "Not to be confused with..." | list10 = * {{tl|distinguish}} * {{tl|distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish}} * {{tl|redirect-distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish6}} * {{tl|About-distinguish}} * {{tl|About-distinguish2}} (for custom text)
| group11 = Hatnote categories | list11 = * [[:Category:Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]] * [[:Category:Hatnote modules|Hatnote modules]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|for category pages]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for names|for [family] names]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for lists|for lists]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for user pages|for user pages]]
| below = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates documentation]] * {{icon|cat}} [[:Category:Hatnote templates]] }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: add * {{tl|category see also}} + {{tl|category see also if exists}}
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Hatnote templates | state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | title = [[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]]
| above = * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Redirect]]
| group1 = Main articles | list1 = *{{tl|main article}} *{{tl|cat main}} (for categories)
| group2 = Generic | list2 = * {{tl|hatnote}} * {{tl|selfref}} (for [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-references]])
| group3 = Other uses | list3 = * {{tl|about}} * {{tl|about2}} (for custom text) * Variations: {{tl|other uses}} * {{tl|other uses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix) * {{tl|other uses of}} (provides context for disambiguation) * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses}} * {{tl|distinguish-otheruses2}} (automatically supplies disambiguation suffix)
| group4 = For (other topic) | list4 = * {{tl|for}} * {{tl|for2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|about}}
| group5 = Further information | list5 = * {{tl|further}} * {{tl|further2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|details}} * {{tl|outline}}

| group7 = Other people | list7 = * {{tl|other people}} * {{tl|about-otherpeople|USE|NAME|PAGE1}} (adds "about" description) * {{tl|other people5}} (for "similar" names)

| group9 = Redirect | list9 = * {{tl|redirect}} * {{tl|redirect2}} (for two redirects) * {{tl|redirect-multi}} (for multiple redirects) * {{tl|redirect-several}} (for several redirects, without listing each) * {{tl|redirect3}} (for custom text)
| group10 = "Not to be confused with..." | list10 = * {{tl|distinguish}} * {{tl|distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish}} * {{tl|redirect-distinguish2}} (for custom text) * {{tl|redirect-distinguish6}} * {{tl|About-distinguish}} * {{tl|About-distinguish2}} (for custom text)
| group11 = Hatnote categories | list11 = * [[:Category:Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]] * [[:Category:Hatnote modules|Hatnote modules]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|for category pages]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for names|for [family] names]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for lists|for lists]] * [[:Category:Hatnote templates for user pages|for user pages]]

revision.comment: one template was renamed. other templates case to match normal use and examples.
"other people" is a subtopic of "other topics"

[[Template:This user talk]] (the single template available through this link) goes against some basic hatnote logic ([[WP:NAMB]], etc); if people would like to place it on their talk pages that's fine, but it shouldn't get advertised here
move categories as daughter nodes of the big category link at the bottom
actually, this duplicates the link at the very top
move category hatnotes into the dedicated [[Template:Category hatnote templates]]

rm {{Other Pennsylvania townships}} and {{Pope Stephen ToP Dab}} – chances are that all articles that ever needed hatnotes for Pennsylvanian townships or for popes named "Stephen" will already have them by now – unlikely to be sought by editors using this navbox
move templates for use in article sections (rather than in lede) into a separate group; reorganise the rest
*{{tl|For outline}} is used only in sections
/* top */ the template's name here was actually a better guide to its use than the explanatory note

Undid revision 958664017 by [[Special:Contributions/Zyxw|Zyxw]] ([[User talk:Zyxw|talk]]) this is only for mainspace templates (category template are listed in [[Template:Category hatnote templates]], the newly created template-specific version of "see also" is too obscure to be listed here anyway)
Removed Other_uses2 as it's being deleted
Group 6 (For use in sections): Add [[Template:Further ill]].
Updated template names after moving them to those names
rm {{Redirect-distinguish-for}}: it's an extremely obscure template that also should probably be deprecated and deleted as it uses a non-standard order of entries
/* top */ this section is only for the most basic templates: if it's got "distinguish" in it, it should be listed in the "Distinguish" section further down
remove {{about-redirect}} from this navbox – that template is being deleted at TfD

Group 6 (For use in sections) : Add {{Further ill}}. Note: use full pagename to ensure bold black text while viewing that template page, but follow presentation style with curlies etc., of all the other links for consistency.

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1223378013|1223378013]] by [[Special:Contributions/Mathglot|Mathglot]] ([[User talk:Mathglot|talk]]) Never mind; it was already there—but under the full name which is pretty unwieldy; would probably be better to replace that with this entry but whatever.
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hatnote_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name = Hatnote templates
| state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| belowclass = hlist
| title  = [[WP:Hatnote#Hatnote templates|Hatnote templates]]

| above =
*[[Wikipedia:Hatnote]]
*[[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]]
*[[Wikipedia:Redirect]]

| group1 = Generic
| list1 =
*{{tl|Hatnote}}
*{{tl|Hatnote group}}
*{{tl|Self-reference}}

| group2 = For and about
| list2 =
*{{tl|For}}
*{{tl|For-text}} (for custom text)
*{{tl|For-multi}} (for multiple uses)
*{{tl|About}}
*Variations: {{tl|Other uses}}
*{{tl|Other uses of}}
*{{tl|Redirect-distinguish-for}}
*{{tl|About-distinguish}}
*{{tl|About-distinguish-text}}

| group3 = Other topics
| list3 =
*{{tl|Other people}}
*{{tl|About other people}} (adds "about" description)
*{{tl|Similar names}}
*{{tl|Other storms}}
*{{tl|Other places}}
*{{tl|Other ships}}

| group4 = Redirect
| list4 =
*{{tl|Redirect}}
*{{tl|Redirect2}} (for two redirects)
*{{tl|Redirect-multi}} (for multiple redirects)
*{{tl|Redirect-several}} (for several redirects, without listing each)
*{{tl|Redirect-synonym}}
*{{tl|Redirect-distinguish}}
*{{tl|Redirect-distinguish-text}}
*{{tl|Redirect-distinguish-for}}
*{{tl|Technical reasons}}

| group5 = Distinguish
| list5 =
*{{tl|Distinguish}} (supports custom text)
*{{tl|About-distinguish}}
*{{tl|About-distinguish-text}} (for custom text)
*{{tl|Redirect-distinguish}}
*{{tl|Redirect-distinguish-text}} (for custom text)
*{{tl|Redirect-distinguish-for}}

| group6 = For use in sections
| list6 =
*{{tl|Main}}
*{{tl|Main if exists}}
*{{tl|Main list}}
*{{tl|Further}}
*{{tl|Further-text}} (for custom text)
*{{tl|Further interlanguage link}}
*{{tl|See also}}
*{{tl|See also-text}} (for custom text)
*{{tl|For outline}}
*{{tl|For timeline}}

| group7 = Special
| list7 =
*{{tl|Broader}}
*{{tl|For introduction}}
*{{tl|See Wiktionary}}
*{{tl|Transcluding article}}
*{{tl|Transcluded section}}

| group8 = Subject specific
| list8 = 
* {{tl|About year}}
* {{tl|Highway detail hatnote}}
* {{tl|For LMST}}
* {{tl|WikiIPA}}

| below =
*{{Icon|cat}} [[:Category:Hatnote templates]]
**[[:Category:Hatnote modules|modules]]
**[[:Category:Hatnote templates for names|for [family] names]]
**[[:Category:Hatnote templates for lists|for lists]]
*[[Template:Category hatnote templates|hatnote templates for category pages]]
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
